summary_en: 150,000 shares (2.3% of shares outstanding) to be acquired. Upper limit ¥12.0B. Acquisition window May 15 – Nov 11, 2026. Method: open-market purchase via securities company commissioned trading on Tokyo Stock Exchange. Rationale: improved operating profit and stronger financial position; execution planned concurrently with dividend implementation and shareholder benefits introduction, while maintaining growth investment as priority.
title_en: Notice Regarding Establishment of Treasury Stock Acquisition Framework (Acquisition of Treasury Stock Based on Provisions of the Articles of Incorporation under Article 165, Paragraph 2 of the Companies Act)
translation_en_brief:
On May 14, 2026, Wagokoro Co., Ltd. announced establishment of a treasury stock acquisition framework via board resolution. The company will acquire up to 150,000 ordinary shares (2.3% of shares outstanding, excluding treasury stock) with an upper limit of ¥12.0 billion during the period from May 15, 2026 to November 11, 2026. The acquisition will be executed via open-market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange using commissioned trading through a securities company.

The company cited improved operating profit and strengthened financial foundation as rationale. This acquisition is being implemented concurrently with dividend implementation and introduction of shareholder benefits programs. Management emphasized that the acquisition maintains sufficient funding capacity for growth investments, which remain the highest priority, while simultaneously advancing reconciliation of revenue expansion and capital efficiency improvement.

As of March 31, 2026, the company held zero treasury shares against 6,578,524 shares outstanding (excluding treasury stock).
